description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the femtopixel/multiarchbuilder Docker image with a docker:dind service and sets the DOCKER_HOST variable to tcp://docker:2375. Define a single stage named build and a build job that runs only on the master branch. In the before_script, execute: docker run --rm --privileged multiarch/qemu-user-static:register --reset; clone https://github.com/estesp/manifest-tool, checkout v0.9.0, run make and make install, then remove the repository; clone https://github.com/computermouth/qemu-static-conf.git, create /lib/binfmt.d, and copy its *.conf files there; finally log in to Docker Hub with echo "$DOCKER_HUB_PASSWORD" | docker login -u "$DOCKER_HUB_LOGIN" --password-stdin. In the script step, run make. No caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined.
